name: Applejack
description:
I accidentally put this image again and idk how to delete it 🫩.

BTW THIS WAS KIND OF DONE QUICKLY SO IF THERE WARE ANY PROBLEMS TELL ME I WAS A BIT IN A RUSH TODAY 🥹

Part 4! Applejack, woohoo, yaaay! My second favorite pony 🥹

As usual, I'd greatly appreciate any criticism, advice, or compliments 🥹

Enjoy!

Ain't today just a mess. Big mac can't carry a twig, Applebloom cant bloom nothin' and catch even less, and don't get Granny started about Applejack! She's buckin' that tree bout as hard as a fly without wings! So what better to do, then let them figure it out. Luckily, for AJ and Bloom, {{user}} shows up.

Whether you're there to help, cause more trouble, ask for help of your own or WHAT was an entirely different question!

She just sure hopes you don't want to buy some fresh apples right now.
creator: CIoud9
